title: Fix scorecard_from_question_export write path to use supported scorecard/score tool calls

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing runtime and procedure fixes for real-run stability: (1) add execute_tactus support for plexus.scorecards.create and plexus.score.create, (2) replace actor-driven act stage in scorecard_from_question_export with deterministic Lua tool calls, (3) validate with procedure loader tests and a dry-run/real-run smoke path.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Reworked scorecard_from_question_export to remove actor execution in act stage and route all scorecard/score writes through execute_tactus (The One Tool path). Added deterministic call_plexus_api helper using execute_tactus envelope parsing, explicit error surfacing, and stage progress updates per score. Also removed obsolete agent loop helpers and bumped procedure version to 1.0.1. Validation: pytest plexus/cli/procedure/test_service_yaml_loader.py -q passed.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented and pushed: scorecard_from_question_export now uses execute_tactus for all scorecard/score writes, removes actor-loop dependency in act stage, and includes runtime support for plexus.scorecards.create and plexus.score.create in execute_tactus. Verified with python3 -m py_compile MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py and pytest plexus/cli/procedure/test_service_yaml_loader.py -q.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Regression identified from local run: Tactus runtime rejects procedures without agents (error: 'At least one agent must be defined'). Action: restore a minimal agent block for runtime compatibility while keeping execution path deterministic via execute_tactus-only API calls in Lua. This preserves One-Tool architecture and avoids actor follow-up loops.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Root cause from local run: execute_tactus nested snippet failed at parse-time because the child snippet referenced global Json (nil in that parse path). Fix: call_plexus_api now serializes args to native Lua table literals and builds snippets without Json.encode/decode dependency.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing full two-pass AI generation architecture now: add required reference_scorecard_identifier, add generator+critic agents, deterministic worklist ordering, strict JSON handoff via done() schema, execute_tactus-only reads/writes, single approval gate, enriched plan output metadata/generated_scores.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementation complete in code; runtime validation in this agent environment is blocked by split-brained Python env (conda vs Poetry), so local user validation in canonical Poetry env is required for dry-run/apply smoke tests.
